Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s a new day, which means Don takes the contestants' training to new heights..literally. But first, the All-Stars are split into teams for a searching mission, using Offgrid’s Faraday bags. Later, they’re introduced to the new ropes course, “The Odyssey”, to test their mental and physical fortitude, as well as their endurance, using a climbing wall. See who rises to the occasion and who suffers from "paralysis by over analysis” in this episode.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Cavalcade of the West 1939 .
programme.desc: Two brothers are separated when young. One becomes the pony express rider Clint Knox and the other the outlaw Ace Carter. Their next meeting finds Ace way‑laying Clint as he delivers the mail

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: Gene Autry stars as a singing cowboy who helps protect settlers from a gang of outlaws, using both courage and music to bring justice to the frontier

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Bandit 1935
programme.desc: In The Cowboy and the Bandit, Rex Lease saddles up for action in a fast-paced tale of loyalty, lawlessness, and frontier justice. When a notorious outlaw’s fate collides with that of an honest cowboy, the line between friend and foe blurs as danger closes in. Packed with hard-riding chases, six-gun showdowns, and plenty of Western grit, this classic delivers thrills where the open range meets the outlaw trail.

programme.title: Rough Riders' Round-Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over, Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen. Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices.

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos 1941
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in Robin Hood of the Pecos, a stirring tale set in the turbulent days after the Civil War. When corrupt officials exploit and oppress Texas ranchers, Roy rises as a champion of the people—fighting injustice with his six-guns and his songs. With the help of Gabby Hayes and heroine Marjorie Reynolds, he takes on the villains to bring peace and fairness back to the frontier. Filled with action, music, and Roy’s trademark charm, this Western delivers justice in true outlaw-hero style.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: When a gang attacks his ranch and kills one of his ranch hands, Jim Roberts gets together with his neighbors to fight the Bennett Cattle Co., whom they are sure is behind the attacks in a scheme to drive them off their land so they can get it for themselves, then build packing plants so they don't have to spend the money to ship cattle back east

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks 1961
programme.desc: Marlon Brando directs and stars in One-Eyed Jacks, a gripping Western of betrayal and revenge. As outlaw Rio (Brando) breaks free from prison, he sets his sights on settling the score with his former partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), who double-crossed him years before and now wears the badge of a sheriff. But Rio’s quest for vengeance grows complicated when he falls for Longworth’s spirited daughter, leaving him torn between love and justice. Sweeping vistas, raw emotion, and Brando’s electrifying presence make this a Western unlike any other.
